title: narcissus rupicola subsp. pedunculatus
intro: Narcissus rupicola subsp. pedunculatus, also known as the alpine narcissus or pedunculate rock narcissus, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Narcissus rupicola subsp. pedunculatus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
